title: Mo' Pistons
description: Adds more variants of pistons to Minecraft!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd7cdcaea864aec9aed9ca83ffc03d74a3a99a64.png)

It's as simple as the name! Bringing more piston variants to Minecraft. These pistons mimic vanilla blocks... until activated of course!

![v1.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc9e4f2c8016e58f4f3b9edf4a8bf2cd8a62733d.png)

Currently in the mod, we have implemented the following piston and sticky piston variants:
- Andesite Piston
- Bedrock Piston
- Blackstone
- Blue Ice
- Bricks
- Calcite
- Clay
- Deepslate
- Dirt
- End Stone
- Glass
- Glowstone
- Obsidian
- Sand
- Stone

More to come soon!
